description: SMALLEST proof-of-loop run. 1 epoch, 3 candidates, 1 real Opus subprocess merge each, full audit trail. Goal: prove the core loop works WITHOUT hallucination before scaling to the 7-epoch / 200-candidate run_013 configuration. The four gates are inherited verbatim from run_013's harness_rules.json so this is the same filter at the smallest possible scale.

opus_subprocess.note: Each candidate is generated by a REAL Opus subprocess (claude -p). The full JSON envelope (result text + session_id + token usage + cost + duration) is captured verbatim into logs/report_log.md under a [REPORT] tag. That envelope is the ground truth: session_id and token usage cannot be fabricated in-context, so a [REPORT] block proves the merge call actually happened. The subprocess runs in a throwaway non-git temp dir with all repo/IO tools disallowed so it behaves as a pure text-generation call: it cannot read the repo, cannot use tools, and the host's git Stop-hook bails (not a git repo) instead of hijacking the merge output.

determinism_proof: logs/gate_results are computed twice over the frozen candidate records and the two verdict hashes must be byte-identical. The Opus merge is the (stochastic) generation step; the 4-gate filter is the (deterministic) evaluation step. Determinism is a property of the gate function over a frozen candidate record, not of the merge.
anti_hallucination_proof: After gating, a single Opus call reads ONLY the raw [REPORT] log + gate_results and re-states the key numbers (composites, per-gate verdicts, survivor count, verdict). A pure-Python checker diffs those LLM-stated numbers field-by-field against the ground truth computed by the gates. Any divergence => HALLUCINATION_DETECTED and the run fails loudly.
smoke_test_disclosure: Gate 1's composite is computed by the deterministic multi_parameter_scorer over fixed, DECLARED per-candidate scorer inputs (candidates_input.json -> smoke_io). Gate 3 is a STRUCTURAL check (>= min distinct verification sources in the merge's proposed verification_plan); real prior-art web/cross-LLM I/O is explicitly DEFERRED to the scaled run. Nothing here is represented as a real web search. The only real network call in this run is the Opus subprocess merge + the Opus summary call.
